verses.text: Pilna in a inn lam a, a innkhuampi sagih a phut hi
Amah in pawi bawl dingin sa go-in leenggahzu khaih a, annekna ding sabuai a bawl hi
Khuasung munsang khempeuh panin mi a sam dingin a nasem numeite sawl a
“Thu theilote aw, hong pai un,” ci-in samsak a, mihaite kiangah
“Hong pai un la, ka an huansa ne-in, ka bawlsa leenggahzu hong dawn un
Thu theilote taisanin khan'sau un la, pilna lampi zui un,” cisak hi
Mihaite thuhilh lecin hong maizumsak ding a, migilote thuhilh lecin hong sugawp ding hi
Mihaite thuhilh kei in; hong mudah ding uh hi. Mipilte thuhilh in; hong it ding uh hi
Mipilte thuhilh lecin pil semsemna-in nei ding a, thuman mite thuhilh lecin a thutheihna uh khang semsem ding hi
Topa zahtakna pen pilna kipatna hi a, Siangtho Pa theihna pen thumuhna ahi hi
Pilna in na khang hong khan ding a, na nuntakna hong sausak ding hi
Pil lecin nangma phattuamna ding hi a, pilna don kei lecin nangma supna ding ahi hi
Haina pen a kamtam, zumna mel a theilo numei tawh kibang a
ama kong gei-ah ahi a, a sangpen munah ahi zongin amah tu a
ama kiang a nawkkha, amau' nasep bek a phawk kimlai mite kiangah
“Thu theilote aw, hong pai un,” ci-in samin, mihaite kiangah
“Tui dawnsim, khumdiak a, an neksim, limdiak hi,” ci hi
Tua lai-ah a paite a sihna thu tua lai-ah a lutsate sihna gam thuk sungah a om khitna thu, a khemzawh mite in phawkkhalo uh hi.
